title: Techmod
description: Build, automate, and explore — from intricate factories to breathtaking landscapes, Techmod turns Minecraft into your ultimate engineering adventure.
body:
Techmod
Build. Automate. Explore.

Techmod is a Forge 1.20.1 modpack blending the best of industrial automation, immersive exploration, and performance optimization. From massive, moving contraptions to advanced energy networks, you’ll craft your own technological empire while adventuring through a world filled with new biomes, structures, and challenges.

Features
- Industrial Powerhouses
- Create – Mechanical automation, rotating machinery, and stunning contraptions.
- Mekanism – High-tech machinery, ore processing, and advanced power systems.
- Create Big Cannons & Create New Age – Heavy artillery and expanded engineering possibilities.

World & Exploration
- Terralith – A massive world generation overhaul with stunning biomes.
- Farmers Delight – Expanded farming, cooking, and food systems.
- Supplementaries & Bells and Whistles – Decorative blocks and functional building elements.
  
Performance Boost
Embeddium, FerriteCore, ModernFix – Smoother gameplay, faster loading, and better frame rates.

Navigation & Multiplayer
- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map – Never get lost again.
- Simple Voice Chat – Talk with friends directly in-game.

Technical Details
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

Loader: Forge (NeoForge 47.1.106)

Optimized for multiplayer servers and large-scale builds.

Perfect for players who want to combine engineering creativity with beautiful exploration while keeping gameplay smooth and responsive.
